next_action: CR137 closed READY_WITH_RISK. Next recommended CR: offline batch run using run registry as the local index base, unless user chooses warning cleanup or an independent runtime authorization gate.
summary: CR137 adds an offline runner run registry: local runner-runs.index.json entries for successful validated bundles and blocked diagnostic runs, with registry API and CLI append/list/inspect paths. It remains offline-only.
title: Offline Runner Run Registry
